name: log_analyzer_agent
description: Analyzes application logs across Splunk, ServiceNow, and other systems via Compass to trace errors, patterns, and incidents
welcomeMessage:
👋 Log Analyzer ready!

I can search logs across Splunk, ServiceNow, and other systems via Compass.

Provide me with:
 • An error message or pattern
 • A correlation/trace/request ID
 • A service name and time window
 • A user or session identifier

I'll reconstruct the event timeline and identify root cause.
